name: @speedora/active-speaker-intelligence
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Speaker Intelligence roadmap Milestone A - Active Speaker Detection, Speaker-Face Association, and Lip Sync Verification. All three are pure AGGREGATIONS over @speedora/facial-intelligence's already-collected face-landmark samples (jawOpen/trackId) and an AudioActivityWindow timeline (same shape facial-intelligence's own speakerAudioSyncRate already consumes) - no new subprocess/detector of its own, no DB/queue access. See docs/ai/speaker-intelligence.md.
